name: Cheese Blintzes
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat half the eggs slightly in a small bowl.
2. Add 3/4 salt, oil and milk to the beaten eggs. Blend thoroughly.
3. Gradually add flour to the mixture. Beat until smooth.
4. Pour 2 tablespoons batter into a hot, lightly oiled 6-inch skillet. Tilt the pan to spread the batter evenly.
5. Cook over low heat until set. Remove from the pan.
6. Repeat with the remaining batter.
7. In another bowl, combine cottage cheese, remaining egg, sugar, salt, and cinnamon. Blend well.
8. Place 2 tablespoons of cheese filling in the center of each blintz.
9. Fold the sides toward the center and roll up tightly.
10. Shallow fry in hot oil (375°F) until golden brown. Makes 16 blintzes.
